_comment: Wheel demo (circumductio, drill mode — player army only, no enemy, no auto-win): zoom on the Infantry block (seed 12345, uid 1 at ~650,300, facing south), select it, press C to wheel it right, then Z to wheel it back left. One flank file plants and holds while the rest of the block swings around it like a door on a hinge, so the line ends up facing a new bearing and lying along a new line with every man still in his rank and file — distinct from the quarter-turn (facing changes in place, block stays put) and the centre pivot (both flanks sweep about the middle). Each 90 degree wheel is a stately ~1 s swing (60 ticks), so the holds are spaced to let each finish. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
